author: anon-295fd0bb
content: The most elegant fix: migrate all eprintln!/println! calls in library code paths to tracing::warn!/tracing::info!. The tracing crate is already used throughout the project and its subscriber model means output is routed to wherever the subscriber sends it — stderr in CLI mode, nowhere in TUI mode (or to a TUI log panel later). This is a one-time mechanical replacement that prevents future regressions too.
